subject: English
title: The Adventures of Toto – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story is written by Ruskin Bond
Toto is a mischievous monkey bought by Grandfather
Grandfather buys Toto from a tonga-driver for five rupees
Toto causes many funny and troublesome incidents in the house
Finally Toto is sold back because the family cannot manage his mischief
characters: Toto – A clever but mischievous monkey
Grandfather – An animal lover who keeps many pets
Grandmother – A practical woman who dislikes new animals in the house
Narrator – The boy who observes Toto’s adventures
themes: Wild animals are difficult to keep as pets
Curiosity and mischief can cause trouble
Love for animals should be balanced with practicality
literary_devices: Humour – The story contains many funny incidents caused by Toto
Descriptive imagery – The author vividly describes Toto’s appearance and actions
exam_tips: Remember that Toto is bought for five rupees
Focus on humorous incidents like the train journey and kettle episode
Mention Toto’s mischievous nature in answers
Explain why the family finally sells Toto
